def normalize(s):
    # remove diacritics and tatweel and punctuation; unify hamza forms
    s = re.sub(r'[ـ]', '', s)
    # remove diacritics
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if not unicodedata.category(ch).startswith('M'))
    # unify hamza forms by mapping to alif
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove punctuation and non-letters
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

target_full = "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ رُسُلًا إِلَى قَوْمِهِمْ فَزادَهُمْ عُضَالًا وَجَزَعًا"
target_norm = normalize(target_full)
target_norm
